'''Seb Arkos''', nicknamed '''Arky''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] criminal who specialized in forgery of documents. He was of tall but lanky stature. Arkos was originally caught by [[Hal Horn]] and eventually sentenced to an unknown amount of years of hard labor in the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|Spice Mines of Kessel]]. On [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], he joined a group around [[Booster Terrik]], who had also been caught by Horn and sent to Kessel two years earlier. Arkos eventually escaped from Kessel and tried to hide on [[Darkknell/Legends|Darkknell]], where he again offered his service of forgery. [[Moranda Savich]] tried to get new passports from him in order to vanish from Darkknell.
